title: Soothing Melodies 014
desc: Soothing Melodies is a calming kids’ program designed to create a peaceful and comforting sleep environment. With gentle lullabies and soft, relaxing music, it helps little ones unwind, feel safe, and drift naturally into restful sleep. Perfect for bedtime, nap time, or quiet moments on screen when calm and comfort matter most.

title: Sweet Dreams 013
desc: Soothe your baby to sleep with Twinkle Tunes, a delightful collection of gentle musical tunes. Each melody is crafted to calm and comfort, creating the perfect bedtime atmosphere. Let the enchanting sounds lull your little one into a peaceful sleep. Ideal for bedtime routines and a parent's perfect companion for a serene night.

title: Non Stop Hits 036
desc: Your little ones won't stop tapping their feet to this fun collection of popular songs for kids. So get ready to make your kids' day a musical one with Non-Stop Hits!

title: Back to Classics 016
desc: You're never too old to listen to a classic! Sing along with your kids to a classic collection of Nursery Rhymes and songs! Featuring songs like Johny Johny, Wheels on the Bus and more, Back to the Classics is sure to give your little ones a great time!

title: Mango Minutes 007
desc: Mango Minutes is a humorous non-verbal show, suitable for children aged 3 and up. It follows the solo antics of the mischievous monkey Mango, of ‘The Adventures of Annie & Ben’ fame.

title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments 012
desc: A simple drawing and coloring video collection for kids with soothing music. The best of coloring and drawing videos for children to help them improve, enhance and even learn how to paint.

title: Melody Mates 004
desc: Bring joy and learning to your child's day with Melody Mates, a lively collection of fun nursery rhymes. Each rhyme is filled with catchy tunes and playful lyrics that engage and entertain. Perfect for playtime or learning, Melody Mates makes every moment magical and educational. Join the fun and let the music inspire your little one's imagination and creativity!

title: The Adventures of Annie & Ben 016
desc: The Adventures of Annie & Ben is a travel fantasy. When they visit real places, their experiences are nothing short of magical. They make friends – some human, some animal and some mythical! Yet, the trio is always open so everyone and everything. The show teaches children about world cultures and history. But most of all, it teaches them to embrace new people, places and experiences. Annie, Ben and Mango- you never know where they’re going to go!
